name: MPM Holdings, Inc.
description: MPM Holdings Inc., operating as Momentive, is a global leader in the development and manufacture of advanced silicones and specialty materials. The company provides innovative solutions across diverse industries, including automotive, electronics, healthcare, consumer goods, energy, and industrial manufacturing. By leveraging its expertise in silicone chemistry, quartz, and specialty ceramics, Momentive delivers high-performance products that enhance reliability, efficiency, and sustainability for customers worldwide. Headquartered in the United States, the company maintains a significant international presence, focusing on delivering cutting-edge material science to solve complex technical challenges in modern industrial applications.
